introSection: Pégase Express is a steel launched roller coaster located at Parc Astérix in Plailly, Hauts-de-France, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was confirmed by the park manager in December 2014.

Pégase Express opened on 11 June 2017.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Pégase Express is a Gerstlauer launched roller coaster similar to FireChaser Express at Dollywood.

fullText:
Pégase Express is a steel launched roller coaster located at Parc Astérix in Plailly, Hauts-de-France, France.

The ride was confirmed by the park manager in December 2014.

Pégase Express opened on 11 June 2017.

Pégase Express is a Gerstlauer launched roller coaster similar to FireChaser Express at Dollywood.
